examples: One heart is a locket with a picture of you and me together.
Grape sees something in Copper Locket that she will never understand.
What could be more classic than a fine gold locket with your photo inside?
Apparently, Price hoped to keep some of the ashes in a locket to wear around her neck, to remember her former husband by.
